creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 192827
DOCSDIR for qwt6

Flavorization of qwt6 has revealed a conflict with qwt5 for docs.

Remove uniquefiles:dirs and add DOCSDIR with flavors. So, qwt6-qt4, qwt6-qt5 and qwt5 can be installed together.

The patch, revert this review https://reviews.freebsd.org/D14462?id=39693#inline-87884
